creator: vs@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

On 30.08.2006, at 12:53, Cheng-Lung Sung wrote:

> On Wed, Aug 30, 2006 at 12:38:05PM +0800, Volker Stolz wrote:
>> Hm, please be careful with this: this patch introduced an error at
>> least in databases/clip since LDCONFIG_DIRS was set. In that case,
>> setting 'USE_LDCONFIG=yes' will force LDCONFIG_DIRS *back* *to* *the*
>> *default* *value*, thus breaking the intended mechanism of runnung
>> ldconfig on a custom directory.
>
> In databases/clip, LDCONFIG_DIRS will become useless, maybe we  
> should remove
> it,too.

Only if you Do The Right Thing, e.g. setting USE_LDCONFIG to the  
value now stored in LDCONFIG_DIRS (untested).
- --
"In Macao ist alles besser!"
http://lambda.foldr.org/~vs/
